__NOTOC__
=== God sends lying spirits, delusions ===
1Ki 22:19–23 <small>(cf. 2Ch 18:18–22)</small>; Job 12:16–25; Eze 14:7–9; 2Th 2:11–12; Rev 17:17

=== God blinds eyes and hardens hearts ===
Jn 9:39–41; 12:39–40 <small>(cites Isa 6:10)</small>; Ro 11:7–10

=== God conceals things ===
Dt 29:29; Pr 25:2; Mt 11:25–27 <small>(cf. Lk 10:21–24)</small>; Mt 13:10–11

=== Satan is the great deceiver ===
Jn 8:44; 2Co 4:3–4; 11:3; 2Th 2:9–10; Rev 12:9

=== The heart is deceitful ===
Jer 17:5, 9

== See also ==
* [[Vain thoughts]]
* [[Purpose of parables]]

== External links ==
* [http://www.jimmcguiggan.com/questions2.asp?q_ID=22 Think Noble Things of God! › Does God deceive people?]

[[c:Prolegomena]]
